name: Farmington Senior High School
description: Farmington Senior High School is a place to play pickleball in Farmington, MO. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Haney Park
description: Haney Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Park Hills, MO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: St. Joseph Catholic School---Farmington
description: St. Joseph Catholic School---Farmington is a place to play pickleball in Farmington, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
